needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To express the length condition on partitions.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.sort_sorted (r : α → α → Prop) [DecidableRel r] (s : Multiset α) : (Multiset.sort r s).Sorted r
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To prove that the sorted list of parts is decreasing, which is needed for the antitone condition.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.sort_eq_sort (r : α → α → Prop) [DecidableRel r] [IsTotal α r] (s : Multiset α) : (Multiset.sort r s).val = s
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To relate the sorted list back to the original multiset, needed for the inverse direction.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.get (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To extract the i-th element of the sorted list in fromPartition.
To relate the length of the sorted list to Multiset.card, needed for the index bounds.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Nat.Partition.ext {n : ℕ} {x y : n.Partition} (parts : x.parts = y.parts) : x = y
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To prove equality of Nat.Partitions in the bijection proof.
